files.SKILL.md:
---
name: certified-skill
description: >
  This skill should be used when the user asks to "audit a skill",
  "review quality", "score this skill", or mentions certification readiness.
  It produces an evidence-backed scorecard and recommended next step.
argument-hint: "path-to-skill"
allowed-tools:
  - Read
  - Glob
  - Grep
---

# Certified Skill

Diagnose one skill and produce an evidence-backed scorecard because certification decisions need repeatable proof.

## Usage

- `/certified-skill skills/example`
- `Audit this skill folder for release readiness`

## Before Auditing

Read `references/policy.md` when a score is disputed. Skip it for a quick routing check.

## Core Process

| Step | Action | Rationale |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Inventory files | File coverage prevents blind scoring. |
| 2 | Parse frontmatter | Routing quality depends on metadata. |
| 3 | Apply gate | Binary checks catch structural blockers. |
| 4 | Score rubric | Numeric thresholds make results comparable. |

## Assumptions & Limits

- The target is a text-based skill directory.
- Runtime behavior needs a separate eval loop.
- Scores are structural, not a guarantee of business impact.

## Edge Cases

- **Single-file skill:** skip cross-file coherence and report N/A.
- **Broken reference:** mark quality and coherence gaps.
- **Draft skill:** report blockers instead of guessing intent.

## Good vs Bad Example

Good: `Gate: PASS (13/13)` plus cited evidence and specific fixes.
Bad: `Looks fine` without scores, evidence, or next action.

## Anti-Patterns

| Pattern | Risk | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| Score without evidence | Unstable review | Cite the file or section |
| Generic fix | No action follows | Name the exact change |

## Failure Modes

| Failure | Signal | Recovery |
|---|---|---|
| Missing SKILL.md | No root skill file | Return BLOCKED |
| Broken reference | Path not found | Cite missing file |
| Disputed score | Reviewer disagreement | Load rubric policy |

## Validation Gate

- [ ] Every file was inventoried.
- [ ] Frontmatter was parsed.
- [ ] 13 gate checks were scored.
- [ ] 10 rubric dimensions have evidence.
- [ ] Top issues include fixes.

## Reference Files

| File | Content | Load When |
|---|---|---|
| `references/policy.md` | Scoring policy | Load when a score is disputed |
files.references/policy.md:
# Scoring Policy

Use explicit evidence for each score because the report must be repeatable.
